series_metadata.series_description: Reports, minutes, correspondence and related meterials generated by the GI Promise Council and staff related to the administration of the GI Promise Bill. These documents are included in our constituent correspondence, conference planning, state and college contacts, SOC-ACE, and independent projects.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in offsite storage, or audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released ; Electronic: , or audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released
